title: jasione laevis subsp. orbiculata
intro: Jasione laevis subsp. orbiculata, also known as the blue mountain bluet, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Jasione genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
